revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Death_year_and_age%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Death_year_and_age%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Tracks Wikidata|P570}}
{{Tracks Wikidata|P569}}
{{Lua|Module:Check for unknown parameters}}
{{High-use|10294}}
{{Birth and death year and age}}

== TemplateData ==
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Year of death",
			"type": "number",
			"required": true
		},
		"2": {
			"label": "Year of birth",
			"type": "number",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"3": {
			"label": "Month of death",
			"description": "Optional month in which the subject died",
			"type": "number",
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "Returns a person's year of death and their approximate age at that time"
}
</templatedata>

== Tracking categories ==
* {{clc|Pages using death year and age template with unknown parameters}}
* {{clc|Date of death not in Wikidata}}
* {{clc|Date of birth not in Wikidata}}
* {{clc|Articles without Wikidata item}}

== See also ==
* {{tl|Birth date text}} which accepts formats like "1 April 1990" or "April 1, 1990"
* {{tl|Birth date and age}} or {{tl|Birth-date and age}}
* {{tl|Death date and age}}
* {{tl|Recent birth}} or {{tl|Recent death}}

{{Birth, death and age templates}}

<includeonly>{{sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Date mathematics templates]]
[[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Death_year_and_age%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Tracks Wikidata|P570}}
{{Tracks Wikidata|P569}}
{{Lua|Module:Check for unknown parameters}}
{{High-use|10294}}
{{Birth and death year and age}}

== TemplateData ==
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Year of death",
			"type": "number",
			"required": true
		},
		"2": {
			"label": "Year of birth",
			"type": "number",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"3": {
			"label": "Month of death",
			"description": "Optional month in which the subject died",
			"type": "number",
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "Returns a person's year of death and their approximate age at that time"
}
</templatedata>

== Tracking categories ==
* {{clc|Pages using death year and age template with unknown parameters}}
* {{clc|Date of death not in Wikidata}}
* {{clc|Date of birth not in Wikidata}}
* {{clc|Articles without Wikidata item}}

== See also ==
* {{tl|Birth date text}} which accepts formats like "1 April 1990" or "April 1, 1990"
* {{tl|Birth date and age}} or {{tl|Birth-date and age}}
* {{tl|Death date and age}}
* {{tl|Recent birth}} or {{tl|Recent death}}

{{Birth, death and age templates}}

<includeonly>{{sandbox other||

}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Date mathematics templates]]
[[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
